name: Code Mode
description: Collapses tool definitions into a single execute_code tool with TypeScript API bindings, reducing token overhead and enabling multi-step orchestration.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum execution time for sandbox code in milliseconds.

allowNetwork.description: Whether to allow network access (fetch) from sandbox code.

agents.description: Per-agent opt-in/opt-out. Omit to enable for all agents.

include.description: If set, only these agent IDs will use code-mode.

exclude.description: If set, these agent IDs are excluded (ignored when include is set).
